name: Sauteed Chicken Breast with Wild Rice Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare soup according to package directions.
2. Combine flour and seasonings in a bowl.
3. Coat chicken pieces in the flour mixture.
4. Melt margarine in a heavy 12-inch skillet over medium heat.
5. Saute chicken until golden brown on both sides (about 5 minutes).
6. Stir in mushrooms and saute until browned (about 4 minutes). Remove any visible fat from the bottom of the skillet.
7. Sprinkle brandy over the cooked chicken.
8. Stir in warm soup and reduce heat to low.
9. Simmer, covered, until chicken is cooked through (about 10 minutes), stirring occasionally to prevent sticking.
10. Remove chicken to a heated serving platter. Serve with brown rice. Serve the sauce in a gravy boat.
